# cobolbridge.ai

Reverse-engineer, refactor, and migrate COBOL, mainframe JCL, and RPG to cloud-native services. Trusted by banks, insurers, and government agencies.

Part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign hive: https://meok.ai

## Pages
- Home: https://cobolbridge.ai/
- Pricing: https://cobolbridge.ai/pricing
- Signup: https://cobolbridge.ai/signup
- Partner: https://cobolbridge.ai/partner
- Enterprise: https://cobolbridge.ai/enterprise
- Demo: https://cobolbridge.ai/demo
